description: Resurrection chapter — Christ appearances and reign pronouns
mustContain: that He was buried, that He was raised
Then He appeared to over five hundred
For He must reign until He has put all His enemies
He put all things in subjection under His feet
He is excepted who subjected all things to Him
mustNotContain: that he was buried, that he was raised
For he must reign until he has put all his enemies
“he put all things in subjection under his feet.”
